title: Test Wrath of the Old Ones: 108-E02 DRAW_CARDS_VARIABLE

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Return all primary creatures and magic cards to their original owner's deck (shuffle). Players then draw the same number of cards they sent.

plan.title: Test Wrath of the Old Ones: 108-E02 DRAW_CARDS_VARIABLE
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Wrath of the Old Ones and verify that 108-E02 DRAW_CARDS_VARIABLE resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

notes: Rules text: after all primary creatures and magic cards are returned to owner decks, players draw the same number of cards they sent.
Pre-place field cards so Player 1 and Player 2 each have returned-card draw counts.

steps: Player 1 plays Wrath of the Old Ones.
Verify each player draws the number of cards they returned.
manualVerification: Confirm the draw count equals the number of cards each player sent to deck.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
